conciliations.title: Conciliations
conciliations.subtitle: Reconciliation order status
conciliations.emptyDesc: Once the first reconciliation order arrives, it will appear here.
conciliations.emptyWrongMode: Your account operates in Direct notification mode. Conciliations are only available in Reconciliation mode. Change the mode from Settings to see them.
conciliations.renotifyTitle: Are you sure you want to re-notify?
conciliations.renotifyDesc: This will send the webhook again and trigger actions on the target system.
